summary: Comprehensive testing of lease tracker app restructure with tabbed spreadsheet layout, building ID sorting, and deposit return fields - all major features working correctly

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (dashboard, notifications, leads) working correctly
Properties creation and sorting by building_id ascending (None values last)
Tenant creation with deposit return fields (deposit_return_date, deposit_return_amount, deposit_return_method)
Tenant update with deposit return fields working correctly
Calendar timeline sorting by building_id and units numerically
TenantsPage loads with two tabs: Current & Future Tenants and Past Tenants
Properties collapsed by default showing Address + Occupancy count
Spreadsheet-style tenant rows with correct column order
Future tenants toggle with ↳ prefix and light blue background
Airbnb/VRBO tags displayed correctly next to tenant names
Past Tenants tab sort toggle (By Unit vs By Move-Out Date)
By Move-Out Date view with quarterly sections (e.g. Jan–Mar)
Tenant detail dialog opens when clicking rows
Add Tenant dialog with deposit return fields working
Building ID field present in property create/edit dialog
CalendarPage timeline still working correctly with proper sorting
